meta.name: MyCity Backend Architecture
meta.description: Arcforge-style backend architecture for a city government issue reporting and district operations platform.
meta.product: Smart city complaint and municipal service management platform

data.label: Citizen App
data.subtitle: web/mobile
data.description: Citizens report water leaks, road breaks, street light failures, waste issues, and other city service problems.

data.label: District Staff App
data.subtitle: operations portal
data.description: District officers, supervisors, and city administrators manage queues, assignments, SLAs, and resolution.

data.label: API Gateway
data.subtitle: router
data.description: Routes public, staff, admin, and webhook traffic to backend modules.

data.label: Auth Middleware
data.subtitle: middleware
data.description: JWT/session auth, role checks, district scope checks, rate limiting.

data.label: IssueController
data.subtitle: controller
data.description: Handles complaint creation, issue detail, listing, comments, and attachment confirmation.

data.label: WorkflowController
data.subtitle: controller
data.description: Handles assignment, status updates, escalations, and district operations views.

data.label: StoreIssueRequest
data.subtitle: form request
data.description: Validates category, location, district, media keys, and idempotency key.

data.label: UpdateStatusRequest
data.subtitle: form request
data.description: Validates allowed workflow transition, actor role, notes, and resolution payload.

data.label: IssueResource
data.subtitle: resource
data.description: Formats issue response JSON for citizen and staff clients.

data.label: IssueService
data.subtitle: service
data.description: Creates issues, writes audit trail, persists media references, emits IssueCreated.

data.label: RoutingService
data.subtitle: service
data.description: Maps issues to district and department queues using category and geolocation.

data.label: WorkflowService
data.subtitle: service
data.description: Assignment, status transitions, SLA timers, escalation, and resolution logic.

data.label: IssueRepository
data.subtitle: repository
data.description: Persists issues, comments, assignments, status history, and audit rows.

data.label: DistrictRepository
data.subtitle: repository
data.description: Loads district boundaries, service ownership, and queue configuration.

data.label: UserRepository
data.subtitle: repository
data.description: Loads citizen, staff, supervisor, and administrator records with district scope.

data.label: Issue
data.subtitle: model
data.description: Core municipal issue entity.

data.label: District
data.subtitle: model
data.description: Administrative district boundary and ownership metadata.

data.label: User
data.subtitle: model
data.description: Citizen, district staff, supervisor, and central admin.

data.label: PostgreSQL + PostGIS
data.subtitle: database
data.description: Primary source of truth for issues, users, districts, workflow, comments, SLA, and audit logs.

data.label: Redis
data.subtitle: cache
data.description: Rate limiting, hot read cache, sessions, idempotency keys, and queue support.

data.label: Object Storage
data.subtitle: storage
data.description: Stores complaint photos, videos, and generated thumbnails.

data.label: Search Index
data.subtitle: search
data.description: Fast text and geo search for staff dashboards and public browsing.

data.label: IssueCreated
data.subtitle: event
data.description: Raised after the primary DB transaction commits.

data.label: IssueStatusChanged
data.subtitle: event
data.description: Raised after assignment, in-progress, resolved, reopened, or escalated transitions.

data.label: ProcessMedia
data.subtitle: handler
data.description: Thumbnail creation, metadata extraction, and antivirus/moderation checks.

data.label: AssignDistrictQueue
data.subtitle: handler
data.description: Resolves responsible district and department from issue type and location.

data.label: NotifyStakeholders
data.subtitle: handler
data.description: Sends citizen, staff, supervisor, and admin notifications.

data.label: ScheduleSLA
data.subtitle: handler
data.description: Starts or updates SLA timers and escalation windows.

data.label: Queue Workers
data.subtitle: job
data.description: Background workers for media, routing, search sync, notifications, and analytics.

data.label: Maps/Geocoding API
data.subtitle: external
data.description: Reverse geocoding, ward lookup, and district boundary verification.

data.label: SMS/Email/Push
data.subtitle: external
data.description: Citizen and staff notification providers.

data.label: Analytics Warehouse
data.subtitle: analytics
data.description: Operational reporting by issue type, district, SLA, and department performance.
